title: carex dolichophylla
intro: Carex dolichophylla, also known as the long-leaved sedge, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Carex dolichophylla can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
